design_vision: A bold, immersive, portfolio-style experience. Think 'Vercel-meets-editorial-magazine'—stark structural contrast mixed with refined, sophisticated typography and industrial-scale presence. Deep shadows, subtle noise textures, architectural grids, and premium amber/copper accents to signify 'Smart Factory' and 'IT-OT' convergence without looking like a generic tech template.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium
scale.overline: text-xs md:text-sm tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-muted font-semibold
scale.quote: text-xl md:text-2xl font-light italic text-primary border-l-2 border-accent_primary pl-4

typography.notes: Do NOT use Inter, Space Grotesk, or Roboto. Import 'Clash Display' via Fontshare or a standard CDN, and 'Outfit' via Google Fonts. Use tight letter-spacing for headings and loose line-height for body to achieve the editorial feel.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Use CSS Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12) for asymmetrical bento layouts. Never center everything. Maintain visual tension through left-aligned or strategically offset content.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). Keep it sharp and executive, not soft or bubbly.

motion_and_interactions.global: Implement smooth momentum scrolling (Lenis). Apply subtle noise overlay globally (pointer-events-none, fixed, opacity-20).
motion_and_interactions.reveal: Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered staggered reveals: { initial: { y: 20, opacity: 0, filter: 'blur(4px)' }, animate: { y: 0, opacity: 1, filter: 'blur(0px)' }, transition: { duration: 0.8, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] } }
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements should have distinct micro-interactions. Pillar cards reveal deeper context on hover, borders light up with accent color.
motion_and_interactions.parallax: Apply subtle parallax to background images and large typographic elements.
motion_and_interactions.cursor: Implement a custom subtle cursor (e.g., small dot that expands on interactive elements).

components.hero: Immersive 100vh section. Dark, abstract, optionally uses TSParticles for a subtle floating node effect (representing IT-OT/Network). Huge animated typography: 'Prashant Kumar' dropping in. Overline: 'Digital Transformation Leader'.
components.stat_counters: Large numeric counters (21+, etc.) using intersection observer to count up. Numbers in 'Clash Display', accent colored. Labels in small uppercase.
components.pillar_cards: 3-column grid. Sharp borders. Background shifts slightly lighter on hover. Contains 'Business', 'Transformation', and 'Influence'. Reveal deeper text on hover.
components.editorial_timeline: Vertical layout where years stick to the left, and career progression (APAC, IT, OT) flows on the right. Large typography, high contrast.
components.sectors_bento_grid: Asymmetrical grid (e.g., tetris mode). Cells for Industrial, Enterprise IT, Sustainability, APAC Growth. Mix images, solid dark backgrounds, and stark text. Use 'grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4' with varied span sizes.
components.credentials_cloud: Floating pill-shaped tags for MBA, CSM, CISI, Digital Twin, LIMS, MES. Apply subtle endless marquee or floating animation. Pills have 1px solid border, transparent background, text-primary.
components.contact_form: Sleek, heavily customized dark inputs (Shadcn customized). Sharp edges, 1px border. Side-by-side layout with large CTA buttons for WhatsApp (+65 93914327) and Email (prashantkumar18@gmail.com). Include a simple 'Send Message' form.
components.navigation: Sticky/magnetic top header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl, bg-[#050505]/60, border-b border-[#27272A]). Logo on left, links and CTA on right.
components.pages: Ensure subpages (Videos, Articles) share the same root layout, header, footer, and styling logic, containing placeholder grid content.

media.background_texture: CSS noise or grain texture applied globally.
media.hero_visual_concept: Abstract digital data network or luxury architectural lines to symbolize structural transformation.

images.description: Abstract futuristic cyber landscape with digital matrix. Apply heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80) so text pops.
Marina Bay Sands Singapore at night. Deep, rich.
images.usage: Editorial timeline image for 'APAC Regional Coverage' step.

images.description: Man working on machine in a factory. Convert to grayscale via CSS for dark editorial feel.
images.usage: Key Sectors Grid background for 'Industrial/Smart Manufacturing'.

images.description: Gold lines creating a cool, angular abstract design.
images.usage: Key Sectors Grid background for 'Enterprise IT'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup required font: Clash Display (from Fontshare or local font) and Outfit (from Google Fonts).
Install 'framer-motion' for scroll-triggered animations and reveals.
Do NOT use placeholders like via.placeholder.com. ONLY use the Unsplash/Pexels URLs provided in this JSON.
Implement routing for '/' (Home), '/videos' (Videos), and '/articles' (Articles) using React Router.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are attached to all interactive elements per the design system rules.
Ensure no purple or violet gradients are used anywhere.
Hero MUST be visually immersive, text readable over the background image using a heavy gradient overlay or backdrop blur.
Use Lucide-React or Phosphor icons for contact links and functional UI elements.
For the 3D effect, you may use TSParticles or a subtle CSS-based parallax noise background to keep it lightweight but premium.
